title: Update DNS Documentation
body:
### Issue Description

I tried to add DNS servers to my podman network as described in the documentation [here](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-network-update.1.html) and it suggest you can provide a list of IPs. This does not seem to be valid any more. I suggesting make the updates to the documentation to show only adding one IP at a time. 



### Steps to reproduce the issue

```╭─mcamp on ATA-NUC in ~/work-code/mjc-vault-environment
╰─ podman network update mjc-environment_default --dns-add 8.8.8.8,1.1.1.1
Error: unable to parse ip 8.8.8.8,1.1.1.1 specified in AddDNSServer: invalid argument
╭─mcamp on ATA-NUC in ~/work-code/mjc-vault-environment
╰─ podman -v                                                                    
podman version 4.5.0
```

### Describe the results you received

I am able to add IPs individually with this method but not with the comma separated list as described in the documentation

### Describe the results you expected

I expected to be able to add multiple IPs at once
